attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have all required materials and tools before attempting to craft advanced items like a compass. Specifically, you were missing iron_ingots and redstone when trying to craft the compass at Step 60. Additionally, you should have crafted an iron_pickaxe before mining redstone_ore starting from Step 61. Correct the order by first crafting the iron_pickaxe using 3 iron_ingots, then mining redstone_ore and smelting it into redstone. Finally, gather 4 iron_ingots and 1 redstone to craft the compass.

attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have the necessary materials and tools before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, you should first craft a crafting table using oak logs, then use the crafting table to create an oak plank, and subsequently craft an iron pickaxe. After obtaining the iron pickaxe, you can mine iron ore to create iron ingots and finally craft a compass. Avoid repeating actions like mining oak logs or crafting sticks without making progress towards your goal.
